Short CV

Berra Nur İkiz was born in 1998. She completed her undergraduate education at Istanbul University, Department of Pharmacy. In 2025, she continues her master's education, which she started at Marmara University, Department of Pharmacognosy. Berra Nur İkiz is a n instructor at the Pharmacy Services Program of the Vocational School of Health Services.
